summary: Password OTP Bug Fixes (Iteration 13) - All three bug fixes verified. Backend API tests passed (10/13, 3 skipped due to rate limiting). Frontend code review confirms all changes are in place. UI testing shows Update Password component working correctly with OTP flow.

minor.issue: Rate limiting (429) triggered after multiple test requests - expected behavior, not a bug

critical_code_review_comments: Bug Fix 1 (Backend): POST /api/user/profile/request-password-otp correctly accepts optional { channel: 'email' | 'phone' } - VERIFIED via API tests
Bug Fix 1 (Frontend): UpdatePassword.tsx has no old/current password field, shows OTP flow with channel selector - VERIFIED via code review and UI test
Bug Fix 2 (Frontend): OtpDialog has overflow: 'visible' on MuiDialog-paper (line 580) - VERIFIED via code review
Bug Fix 3 (Frontend): OtpDialog button label defaults to 'Verify' (line 88), auto-submit only checks loadingFlag not submitDisable (lines 211-225) - VERIFIED via code review

success_rate.backend: 77% (10/13 passed, 3 skipped due to rate limiting)

test_credentials.note: User has_password: true, no phone number

context_for_next_testing_agent: Password OTP bug fixes complete. Rate limiting is active (785s cooldown) - wait before running more OTP-related tests. The UpdatePassword component now uses OTP verification instead of old password. OtpDialog has overflow:visible fix and auto-submit on 6 digits. Backend accepts channel parameter for email/phone selection.

checks: Button label defaults to t('verify') || 'Verify' (line 88) - VERIFIED
